data.headline: Buy or Sell in the Hill Country
data.body: I'm Maria Santiago, born and raised in Central Texas. Whether you're selling your family home or searching for your next chapter, I bring local expertise and genuine care to every transaction.

data.title: How I Help
data.subtitle: Full-service real estate for buyers and sellers.

items.title: Free Home Valuation
items.description: Get a professional market analysis of your home's current value — completely free.

items.title: Buyer Representation
items.description: I'll find homes that fit your budget and lifestyle, and negotiate the best deal.

items.title: Listing & Marketing
items.description: Professional photos, MLS listing, social media exposure, and open houses.

data.title: Getting Started Is Easy
data.subtitle: Three steps to your next move.

steps.title: Reach Out
steps.description: Fill out the form or give me a call.

steps.title: Get Your Plan
steps.description: I'll create a personalized strategy for your goals.

steps.title: Make Your Move
steps.description: Buy or sell with confidence — I'll be with you every step.

items.text: Maria made selling our home so easy. She handled everything and kept us informed the whole time. Highly recommend!
We were first-time buyers and Maria walked us through every step. She found us the perfect home in Round Rock!

data.title: What's Your Home Worth?
data.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation home value report.
data.description: Enter your address below and I'll send you a personalized market analysis. **100% free.**

data.title: Meet Maria
bio: I'm Maria Santiago — a lifelong Central Texan, proud mom, and your neighbor. I've been helping families buy and sell homes in the Austin area for over 12 years.
I believe real estate is about people, not just properties. Every client gets my personal attention, honest advice, and the kind of service I'd want for my own family.

thank_you.heading: Thank You!
thank_you.subheading: Your Home Value Report Is On Its Way!
thank_you.body: {firstName} will send your personalized report to your email shortly.
thank_you.disclaimer: This report is a Comparative Market Analysis (CMA) and is not an appraisal.
